suggest.eustasy/authenticatron: Enables optional TOTP two-factor auth on the admin panel (also needs ext-gd for the enrolment QR code).
suggest.geoip2/geoip2: Enables minified geo enrichment (country/continent) of stat-tracking events; see the stats_geo settings.
suggest.sentry/sentry: Enables optional error/event reporting to Sentry (or any monitor) via the report_errors setting and the src/hooks/phoenix.init.php + phoenix.error.php hooks.
